headline: Tech and chips hammered in AI selloff
detail: A global AI-driven selloff is pressuring the exact names dominating your book. AVGO, PLTR, and CRWD are all in drawdown with active SELL or TRIM flags. On margin, continued weakness in this cohort compounds losses fast.

headline: Qualcomm nearly doubles 2029 non-handset revenue outlook, stock +15%
detail: Qualcomm's jump signals real demand strength in the broader chip ecosystem beyond smartphones. This is a positive read-through for AVGO and SMH, though it hasn't been enough to lift the sector today amid the broader AI selloff.

headline: Micron surges 12% on memory crunch, revenue quadruples
detail: Micron's blowout is a strong fundamental signal for semiconductors - supply tightness is driving massive pricing power. Directly relevant to SMH, your one chip holding still in the green at +11.32%. Watch whether this lifts the sector or gets ignored.

headline: Wall Street consensus on buying the dip is a warning
detail: When everyone agrees on a trade, it tends to fail. You're margin-long a concentrated tech book in the middle of a chip selloff - this headline is a direct caution for your setup. Complacency here is the risk.
